regional_cost_note: Stonemasons in Invercargill typically charge $360–$750/m² for natural stone walls, $210–$480/m² for stone paving, and $420–$950/m² for heritage restoration. Southland rates are typically 10–15% below the national average, though remote work may attract travel charges. Heritage stonework requires specialist skills — always check the mason's portfolio of similar work.
